title: Advancement Plaques with Vines
description: Resource pack that adds vines to Advancement Plaques!
body:
Resource pack that adds vines to [Grend's](https://modrinth.com/user/Grend) [Advancement Plaques](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancement-plaques])!

Kept the bronze, silver and gold outline for the task, goal and challenge advancement types. However I changed the background to have green, and there are vines twining around every border!
